title: Black Red Gui
description: This is a black and red mixed clean gui for your daily smp needs!
body:
# Black & Red GUI

**Black & Red GUI** gives Minecraft a bold, high-contrast interface makeover with deep blacks and sharp red accents.  
Perfect for players who want a modern, aggressive look without losing menu clarity.

---

## 🎨 Features
- **Dark Black Backgrounds** for menus, buttons, and widgets  
- **Crimson Red Highlights** for selectors, hover effects, and indicators  
- Clean, minimal design that stays readable in all game modes  
- **Lightweight & FPS-friendly** — no performance loss  

---

💾 *Drop it in your resourcepacks folder, enable it, and enjoy the fresh new look.*
